title: Decryption Puzzle
content:
Back in your office, you plug the drive into your terminal. A black screen with a flashing prompt appears:||[ CRITICAL ERROR: ENCRYPTED PARTITION DETECTED ]
[ ENTER 4-DIGIT ACCESS CODE ]||Spider's words ring in your ears: 'He always carried his most important codes with him... on his person.'||You look through the evidence from the scene. What did Vane have on him that could contain a 4-digit sequence?
